title: Implement pending() method to query open bot orders

requirements.summary: Update the frontend open orders hook to call the backend `pending` method instead of any previously incorrect call, ensuring OpenOrdersPanel displays fetched orders correctly.
acceptanceCriteria: The open orders React Query hook in useQueries.ts calls `actor.pending()` (or equivalent generated name).
The OpenOrdersPanel renders the orders returned by the `pending` call without regression.
No stale or incorrect actor method name remains in the open orders query.

file_operations.description: Update the open orders React Query hook to call `actor.pending()` instead of any previous incorrect backend method. Ensure the query key, staleTime, and enabled conditions remain unchanged. The `pending` method returns Array<OrderEntry> matching the existing order data shape (side, price, quantity, orderId, status, timestamp).

Verify that the OpenOrdersPanel correctly consumes the updated open orders query hook and renders the orders returned by `actor.pending()` without regression. Ensure buy/sell counts, sorting by side and price, and the 'Cancel All' button functionality remain intact.
